justin-stutler.title: Justin Stutler

about-this-website.title: How This Portfolio Website Works
about-this-website.summary: Hub explaining this AI-powered portfolio — its LLM-wiki architecture, query flow, and tech stack.

architecture-and-story.title: Architecture and Story
architecture-and-story.summary: Overview of this site's LLM-wiki architecture and a pointer to the fuller development story.

query-flow.title: Query Flow
query-flow.summary: How a visitor's question becomes a grounded answer — scope classification, context retrieval from the markdown knowledge base, and grounded generation, plus failure cases.

tech-stack.title: Tech Stack
tech-stack.summary: The technologies powering this site — Python Flask backend on Render, OpenRouter free-tier LLMs, an Obsidian markdown vault, and a vanilla-JS frontend on Netlify.

the-journey.title: The Journey — From RAG to LLM-Wiki
the-journey.summary: How this site's knowledge base evolved from traditional RAG to a Wikipedia-style LLM-wiki, roughly 6-8 months before Karpathy popularized the idea.

education-kennesaw-state-university.title: Kennesaw State University
education-kennesaw-state-university.summary: Justin's Computer Science study (AI focus) at Kennesaw State University (2020) — 3.75 GPA, Honor Roll, CS fundamentals.

education-milton-high-school.title: Milton High School
education-milton-high-school.summary: Justin's high school (2015-2018) in Georgia — game design, animation, and programming; earned AP credits and first got interested in AI.

education-university-of-north-georgia.summary: Justin's one semester at the University of North Georgia (Fall 2018) — general education courses, term GPA 2.75.

education-usf-graduate.summary: Justin's M.S. in Data Intelligence and Graduate Certificate in AI at USF (Aug 2025 - Dec 2026 expected), plus his May 2025 GRE scores.

education-usf-undergraduate.title: University of South Florida — Undergraduate
education-usf-undergraduate.summary: Justin's B.S. in Information Science (Web Development concentration) at USF, 2022-2024 — 3.67 GPA, Cum Laude.

career-direction.title: Current Career Direction
career-direction.summary: Justin's current career direction — pursuing graduate AI studies with the goal of becoming an AI Engineer who improves the full-stack development lifecycle.

career.title: Career
career.summary: Hub for Justin's professional experience and current career direction; links to a page per role.

magmutual-insurance.title: MagMutual Insurance
magmutual-insurance.summary: Justin's 2020 role at MagMutual Insurance — Software Developer Intern who converted to Contractor, building Python/Go full-stack backend solutions in an Agile team.

piehole.title: PieHole
piehole.summary: Justin's role as Operations Manager at PieHole (2016-2018), a high-volume food service business — team, inventory, and operations management.

autotelic-personality.title: Autotelic Personality
autotelic-personality.summary: Justin's autotelic personality — pursuing challenge for its own sake across DJing, Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu, and sourdough baking.

contact-and-links.title: Contact and Links
contact-and-links.summary: How to reach Justin and find him online — GitHub, LinkedIn, email, and resume, plus basic personal facts.

hobbies.title: Hobbies
hobbies.summary: Justin's hobbies — DJing and Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu (USF BJJ Club member).

interests-and-values.title: Interests and Values
interests-and-values.summary: What Justin cares about — leveraging AI in software workflows, learning new tech, teamwork, continuous learning, and treating every passion as a puzzle.

personal.title: Personal
personal.summary: Hub for who Justin is beyond work and school — interests, hobbies, personality, contact links, and photos.

photos.title: Photos
photos.summary: A small photo gallery of Justin outside of work and school — travel, hobbies, and everyday moments.

ai-personal-assistant.title: AI Personal Assistant with OpenClaw
ai-personal-assistant.summary: Personal project building an AI assistant on the OpenClaw framework to explore agentic AI patterns — tool use, planning, and multi-step reasoning.

deep-learning-capstone.title: Deep Learning Computer Vision Capstone: Song Genre from Album Art
deep-learning-capstone.summary: Graduate capstone (USF, Spring 2026) — ablation study of CNNs vs. ResNets plus a CLIP baseline for predicting music genre from album art.

facial-recognition.title: Facial Recognition: LDA vs SVM vs CNN
facial-recognition.summary: Intro to AI project (USF, Fall 2025) comparing LDA, SVM, and CNN on the Olivetti Faces dataset; SVM won at ~90.06%.

house-prices.title: House Prices: Advanced Regression Techniques
house-prices.summary: Kaggle House Prices regression project (USF, Fall 2025) — 8 models, Optuna tuning, outlier analysis, and a stacking ensemble reaching RMSLE 0.1031.

projects.title: Academic and Personal Projects
projects.summary: Hub for Justin's academic and personal projects across AI, ML, computer vision, and web development; links to a page per project.

robot-localization.title: Robot Localization with Particle Filtering
robot-localization.summary: Intro to AI project (USF, Fall 2025) implementing Monte Carlo particle-filter localization for Pacman (direct) vs. Ghost (noisy) tracking.

senior-capstone.title: Senior Capstone
senior-capstone.summary: Justin's undergraduate BSIS Senior Capstone (Spring 2024) at USF — a full-stack PHP/MySQL CRUD application.

transformer-rl-agent.title: Transformer-Based Reinforcement Learning Agent: Connect 4
transformer-rl-agent.summary: Deep Learning project (USF, Spring 2026) — a Transformer-based DQN that learns Connect 4 via self-play, benchmarked against MLP DQN, heuristic, random, and a Decision Transformer.

uninformed-informed-search.title: Uninformed and Informed Search: Dominoes Puzzle
uninformed-informed-search.summary: Intro to AI project (USF, Fall 2025) comparing Iterative Deepening vs. A* search on dominoes puzzles up to 4x4.

skills-academic-foundations.summary: Justin's foundational technical coursework — computer organization, discrete math, information security, databases, networking, and information architecture.
